work_history.title: Lecturer in Mathematics
responsibilities: Deliver GCSE and A-level Mathematics to 16-19 students
Design schemes of work and assessment materials aligned to AQA specifications
Provide one-to-one support and intervention for underperforming students
Contribute to curriculum review and quality improvement processes

work_history.title: Mathematics Teacher
responsibilities: Taught Mathematics to KS3 and KS4 students including top sets and intervention groups
Led the Year 10 numeracy catch-up programme
Mentored two NQTs during their induction year

work_history.title: Junior Design Engineer
responsibilities: Produced technical drawings and calculations for structural components
Liaised with manufacturing team to ensure design specifications were met

cpd.title: Award in Education and Training (AET)

cpd.title: Numeracy for Life — Functional Skills Delivery
cpd.description: Specialist training in delivering Functional Skills Mathematics at Levels 1 and 2
